name: Familiars of the Spiritual Arts
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>精</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>せい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>霊</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>れい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>術</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>じゅつ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>使</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>つか</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>い<ruby lang="jp"><rb>魔</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ま</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc:
(This card is always treated as a "Familiar-Possessed" card.)
If this card is Normal or Special Summoned: You can add 1 "Possessed" Spell/Trap or "Grand Spiritual Art - Ichirin" from your Deck to your hand. You can declare 1 Monster Type and 1 Attribute; this card becomes that Type and Attribute until the end of this turn. If this card is destroyed by battle or card effect: You can Special Summon 1 Spellcaster monster with 1500 DEF from your Deck or GY. You can only use each effect of "Familiars of the Spiritual Arts" once per turn.
